title: Transcript:Rag and Bone Man II
wikitext:
{{Transcript|quest}}
{{Transcript list|Odd Old Man|Bones (NPC){{!}}Bones}}

==Talking to the Odd Old Man without any bones==
* '''Player:''' So how is the sorting going?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Err...
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' It's going well, especially now I have all the bones I need.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' There are still a few bits and pieces I wouldn't mind, but that's the way things go.
* '''Player:''' Well if I see any bones I think you might like I'll bring them over.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Cheers, we, err, that is myself and the museum staff, really appreciate it.
* '''Sack:''' Snicker.
* {{tact|end}}

==Handing in some bones==
* '''Player:''' I have some bones for you.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Great! Let me take a look at them.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Wonderful! I'll put this with the rest.
* '''Player:''' No problem. I'll be back if I find some more.
* {{tact|end}}

==Trying to hand in unclean bones==
* '''Player:''' I have some bones for you.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Great! Just clean them up in the pot-boiler and hand them over.
* {{tact|end}}

==Finishing up==
* '''Player:''' I have some bones for you.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Great! Let me take a look at them.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' That...that covers all the bones I was searching for!
* '''Player:''' Well I'm glad to have furthered the cause of the museum.
* '''Player:''' I just hope everyone will enjoy the finished displays.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Yes, I'm sure EVERYONE will get a chance to enjoy my work.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Hahahahahahahahahaha!
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Bwahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!
* '''Odd Old Man:''' MWUHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!
* '''Sack:''' Ahem!
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Sorry.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Well anyway, I have a few items I've put together in my spare time if you want one.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' I have a ram skull helm or a snazzy bonesack like mine.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Which would you like?
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|The helm}}
** '''Player:''' The helm.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Good choice!
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come and see me if you lose that one, I have plenty more!
** {{Qact|Congratulations! Quest complete!}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|The bonesack}}
** '''Player:''' The bonesack.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Well chosen, I knew you had taste!
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come and see me if you lose that one, I have plenty more!
** {{Qact|Congratulations! Quest complete!}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Can I have both?}}
** '''Player:''' Can I have both?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' I... Well... I do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.
** {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Well, as much as I'd like to toss them into the dirt and all, I think it's best if you came back later with an empty backpack.
*** {{tact|end}}
** '''Odd Old Man:''' I do think they go well together, actually. 
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come and see me if you lose either one, I have plenty more!
** {{Qact|Congratulations! Quest complete!}}
** {{tact|end}}
